title: Building safe Payment Infrastructure for the autonomous economy — Steve Kaliski, Stripe
summary: Stripe is developing payment infrastructure to enable autonomous agents to execute real transactions safely. The platform addresses secure credential transmission and business discoverability for agent-initiated spending through guardrails and infrastructure designed to mitigate financial risk.
